headings.text: Send your layout to PCBWay for instant production with just one click.
Installation from the official KiCad repositories

sections.heading: PCBWay Plug-In for KiCad
sections.text: Blog > PCBWay Plug-In for KiCad PCBWay Plug-In for KiCad by: Anson Apr 01,2022 107376 Views 36 Comments Posted in News Kicad PCB design Send your layout to PCBWay for instant production with just one click. Have you ever thought that when you complete the design on KiCad, you can place an order on pcbway with just one click? Now this idea is finally achieved (it's not an April Fool's joke). When you click PCBWay Plug-in button on Kicad, we will export these files in your project ( Please make sure you have installed the latest version of the plugin released on July 11, 2024 )： 1.Gerber files in correct format for production 2.IPC-Netlist file 3.Bom-file that includes all information of comp...

sections.heading: Send your layout to PCBWay for instant production with just one click.
sections.text: Send your layout to PCBWay for instant production with just one click. Have you ever thought that when you complete the design on KiCad, you can place an order on pcbway with just one click? Now this idea is finally achieved (it's not an April Fool's joke). When you click PCBWay Plug-in button on Kicad, we will export these files in your project ( Please make sure you have installed the latest version of the plugin released on July 11, 2024 )： 1.Gerber files in correct format for production 2.IPC-Netlist file 3.Bom-file that includes all information of components 4.Pick and Place-file used in assembly You can click "Save to Cart" to place an order immediately after uploading the files( usua...
